title: Artificial intelligence in molecular biology.
author_string: Kundaje, Anshul, Pollard, Katherine S, Ma, Jian, Chang, Xing, Chen, Mengjie et al.
abstract: In recent years, computational methods and artificial intelligence approaches have proven uniquely suited for studying patterns in molecular biology. In this focus issue, we spoke with researchers about using these tools to address various biological questions and explore both current implications and future possibilities.
